description: MCPBus: Turn OpenAPI Spec into MCP Server in Code-mode. MCPBus is a must-have tool for any Agentic AI Developer or Forward Deployed AI Engineer. It is distributed as a stand alone, highly optimized binary, available for all major platforms and OS. Install the binary, run a single command, and get your MCP-server up and running in Code-mode in 1 second. No generated SDKs, no NodeJS, no Python, no VMs.
